fn safe_slice_from_box(data: Box<[u8]>) -> Vec<u8> {
    data.into_vec()
}

fn safe_vec_from_iter(ptr: *const u8, len: usize) -> Vec<u8> {
    let mut result = Vec::with_capacity(len);
    for i in 0..len {
        result.push(unsafe { *ptr.add(i) });
    }
    result
}

fn safe_reinterpret(data: &[u8]) -> Vec<u32> {
    data.chunks_exact(4)
        .map(|chunk| u32::from_ne_bytes([chunk[0], chunk[1], chunk[2], chunk[3]]))
        .collect()
}

fn safe_vec_from_raw(ptr: *mut u32, len: usize, cap: usize) -> Vec<u32> {
    // SAFETY: caller guarantees ptr was allocated with the global allocator,
    // has len initialized elements, and cap total capacity.
    unsafe { Vec::from_raw_parts(ptr, len, cap) }
}
